violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Plastic cups were found stored on the floor in the kitchen. Single use items should be stored off of the floor.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Ceiling tiles above the hand washing sink in the kitchen were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
